idf_component_register(
    SRCS "main.cpp" "bundle_bootstrap.c"
    INCLUDE_DIRS "."
    REQUIRES forth esp_timer driver esp_hw_support spi_flash
             craw_nvs craw_wifi craw_ble_provision craw_hive
             esp_wifi esp_netif nvs_flash esp_event lwip
             bt
)
# bundle_blobs.h (consumed by bundle_bootstrap.c) is generated by
# scripts/bundles_to_header.py — regenerate after editing bundles/*.json.
# We use a generated header instead of EMBED_FILES because PlatformIO's
# IDF wrapper has a known issue tracking the EMBED_FILES .S generation
# step (build fails with "Source not found").
